expectations.text: package.json includes sharp as a dependency
Three distinct buttons are defined for Focus, Meeting, and Communication layouts
expectations.evidence: BUTTONS array with three entries: index 0 (Focus/activateFocusMode), index 1 (Meeting/activateMeetingMode), index 2 (Comms/activateCommunicationMode)

expectations.text: osascript or execSync is used to run AppleScript
expectations.evidence: runAppleScript() calls execFileAsync('osascript', ['-e', script]); used throughout all layout functions

expectations.text: AppleScript 'set bounds' or equivalent is used to position/resize windows
expectations.evidence: 'set bounds of front window to {0, 0, half, height}' for Chrome/iTerm in Focus; 'set position of front window' and 'set size of front window' for Zoom in Meeting

expectations.text: Apps are activated or opened if not already running
expectations.evidence: 'tell application "Slack" to activate', 'tell application "Google Chrome" to activate', 'tell application "zoom.us" to activate' in layout scripts

expectations.text: Each button has a distinct label and icon identifying the layout
expectations.evidence: BUTTONS array: {icon:'🎯', label:'Focus'}, {icon:'📹', label:'Meeting'}, {icon:'💬', label:'Comms'} — each rendered via renderButton()

expectations.text: No external npm packages beyond @elgato-stream-deck/node and sharp are required
expectations.evidence: package.json dependencies only contain @elgato-stream-deck/node and sharp; code only uses built-in node:child_process and node:util
